truthAudit.Summary: The audit confirms that while the previous response identified stack and heap overflow vulnerabilities correctly, it strictly missed 18 of the 20 defined ground-truth vulnerabilities, including the specific command injection in config validation (finding a different location instead) and several critical logic, race, and thread safety flaws.

Items.Notes: Result 'Run 2' did not analyze Section 3 or Section 4 regarding format string vulnerabilities in log messages.
No findings related to the math_engine's factorial function or integer overflows in arithmetic.
Result 'Run 2' missed the Use-After-Free risk spanning Section 2, 8 and 9 related to deferred pool cleanup.

Items.PreviousOutputQuote: OS Command Injection via Admin Command
Items.Notes: Finding 'Run 2' cited the system call in archive 608 (Admin Command) but failed to report the ground truth finding in SC-V3-004 at line 566 (Config Validation).
Confirmed at line 831-832. If input is larger than 1024, strcpy performs an out-of-bounds write.
The race condition regarding ThreadSafeCounter and old_value capture was not identified.
While 'Run 2' mentioned authentication, it did not flag the specific logic bomb at attempts > 5.
Path traversal potential in loader (config_dir_ + filename) was ignored.

Items.PreviousOutputQuote:
for (const auto& token : tokens) expr_str += token.text + " ";
if (expr_str.length() > 0) strcpy(expression_buffer_, expr_str.c_str());
Items.Notes: Confirmed at line 375-376. Heap overflow occurs when concatenated tokens exceed 256-byte allocator grant.
Hardcoded 'ADMIN_SECRET' at line 0073 remained undiscussed.
Weak session generation via small PRNG range was not reported.
Static cached_time in Section 3 is thread-unsafe but not flagged.
Insecure 'sh -c' or 'cmd /C' logic in Section 8 was entirely overlooked.
Persistence logic for authenticated_ and login_attempts_ state did not appear.
Line-range error handling (std::stod outside valid catch block scenario) missed.
Integer underflow analysis on splitting blocks in the allocator (Line 133) was not performed.
Risk of unbounded recursion in expressions not highlighted.
Data race risk within result_cache_ check/logic is correctly ignored by auditor.
Time-of-Check to Time-of-Use (TOCTOU) via sleep_for in file loader not spotted.
Mathematical division by zero in get_setting or calculator logic ignored.
